# Resources.IsResourceNotFoundCode method

Returns `true` when *code* denotes resource-not-found from a CLIENT's perspective — the modern `-32602` or the legacy `-32002`. A client SHOULD accept both. (§17.6, R-17.6-a, R-17.6-c)

```csharp
public static bool IsResourceNotFoundCode(int code)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| code | The error code to test. |

## Return Value

`true` when the code means resource-not-found.
